title: fagara mauiensis
intro: Fagara mauiensis, a species of plant, is commonly known as the Maui prickly ash, which belongs to the family Rutaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Fagara mauiensis include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Fagara mauiensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
